mapper.select: SELECT * FROM media_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM media_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM media_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT tags FROM media_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND tags IS NOT NULL
